name: beat-accent
title: Beat Accent
description: A single music-hit sting: impact flash, micro scale-pulse on the subject, immediate decay.
evidence: Video Primitives v1 GAP C1 (sting: impact flash/scale on a music hit) plus easing vocabulary --ease-slam (expo.out, taste rule 3)

variables.label: Accent text
variables.description: Word or short label emphasized by the beat hit.

variables.label: Flash color
variables.description: Token-backed accent tone used by the radial flash.

variables.label: Intensity
variables.description: Strength of the scale pulse, flash, and shake.
